summary: ISS-1489 resolved by EXP-242 (Option A). For both PRED-SR-SUPPRESS and PRED-093 in data/predictions.json, flip data_predates_registration false→true and is_genuinely_prospective true→false, and append a dated reclassification line to each entry's notes field (prior 2026-04-10 decider text retained verbatim). Aligns the structured fields with the detail_reasoning prose argument that the March 2026-03-20–22 G3 storm Schumann-resonance data was available to the author before registration (March 23 and April 4 respectively). Rejected the curmudgeon's Option B (add new schema field) on minimality grounds — see rejected_option_b_rationale in the EXP. Downstream effect: both entries move from TOMBSTONE to MINED bucket in the rendered site; the "Genuinely Prospective" count on the Predictions Analysis tab drops by 2 (16→14). Four BEFORE anchors verified globally unique. No edits to claim, detail_reasoning, tldr, or any other field. Ready for integration.
